chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4270 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 10.10.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad Asstt. A.G Sindh Mr. Rajesh Kumar advocate for respondents -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. It is an old case of 2024. It was lastly taken up on 18.11.2024, which was almost one year ago, when none was present on behalf of the petitioner without intimation. Despite lapse of almost one year, the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today once again none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
